title: Ahsoka Tano
summary: Ahsoka Tano was the Jedi Padawan of Anakin Skywalker during the Clone Wars. She later left the Jedi Order and became an independent Force user.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore

title: Anakin Skywalker
summary: Anakin Skywalker was a powerful Jedi Knight trained by Obi-Wan Kenobi. He later fell to the dark side and became Darth Vader.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore

title: Darth Vader
summary: Darth Vader was the Sith identity of Anakin Skywalker after his fall to the dark side. He served the Galactic Empire and Emperor Palpatine.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore

title: Obi-Wan Kenobi
summary: Obi-Wan Kenobi was a Jedi Master who trained Anakin Skywalker and later watched over Luke Skywalker on Tatooine.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore

title: Tatooine
summary: Tatooine is a desert planet in the Outer Rim. It is strongly associated with Anakin Skywalker, Luke Skywalker, moisture farms, Jawas, Tusken Raiders, and Hutt influence.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore

title: Jedi Order
summary: The Jedi Order was an ancient organization of Force users who served as guardians of peace and justice in the Galactic Republic.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore

title: Sith
summary: The Sith were dark side Force users who opposed the Jedi and sought power through passion, conflict, and domination.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore

title: Order 66
summary: Order 66 was the command that led clone troopers to turn against the Jedi, causing the near-destruction of the Jedi Order.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore

title: Clone Wars
summary: The Clone Wars were a galaxy-wide conflict between the Galactic Republic and the Separatist Alliance, secretly manipulated by Darth Sidious.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore

title: Revan
summary: Revan is mainly associated with the Legends continuity. Revan was a Jedi who became a Sith Lord and later became connected to major events of the Old Republic era.
source: Manual starter entry inspired by Star Wars lore
